name: Hextech Gunblade

active.name: Lightning Bolt
active.effects: Shocks the target enemy champion with a bolt of lightning, dealing {{as|{{pp|175 + (253-175)/17*(x-1) for 20}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 30% AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 25% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Shocks the target enemy champion with a bolt of lightning, dealing {{as {{pp 175 + (253-175)/17*(x-1) for 20}} magic damage}} {{as (+ 30% AP)}} {{as magic damage}} and {{tip slow slowing}} them by 25% for {{fd 1.5}} seconds.

simpleDescription: Increases Attack Damage and Ability Power, activate to slow a target

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Lightning Bolt is a targeted active against enemy champions and resolves both damage and slow on activation.
Player-visible behavior: active cast range is 700, cooldown is 60 seconds, and the slow branch is 25% for 1.5 seconds.
Wave 129 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit fixed-cooldown active execution metadata (`cast_range`, `cast_windup_seconds`) for targeted Lightning Bolt activation semantics.
